name: PaymentBillingDateChange
description: Customer wants to change, move, or update the date their bill payment or direct debit is taken — they are not setting up a new payment method, asking when their bill is due, or changing their bank/card details.

sampleUtterances.utterance: I need to change my direct debit date
Can I move my payment date to a different day?
Update my bill date please
Is it possible to change when my direct debit comes out?
My pay day has changed and I need my DD moved
I want my payment taken on a different date
How do I change the day my bill is collected?
Move my direct debit to later in the month
The current bill date doesn't work for me — can I switch it?
I get paid on a different week now so I need to adjust my billing date
Can I reschedule when my payment goes out?
Change my DD date
I want my bill to come out on the first of the month instead
Is there a way to push my payment date back a few days?
My direct debit is coming out too early in the month
Amend the payment collection date on my account
I'd like to align my bill date with when I get paid
Can you change the day you take money from my account?
I need to update my automatic payment date
shift my billing date
